steps.title: Read two boundary points from the graph
steps.content:
The shaded region's boundary is the line $rx + ty = -77$. From the graph, the line crosses the x-axis at $(-11, 0)$ and the y-axis at $(0, -7)$.

Substituting $(-11, 0)$:
$$r(-11) + t(0) = -77 \implies -11r = -77 \implies r = 7$$

Substituting $(0, -7)$:
$$r(0) + t(-7) = -77 \implies -7t = -77 \implies t = 11$$
